title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions in Every Category
text: Based on Variety's latest predictions, the TV Drama Actress category featured strong competition. Predicted nominees included Jennifer Aniston ("The Morning Show"), Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Britt Lower ("Severance"), Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"), and Rhea Seehorn ("Pluribus"). Alternative contenders mentioned included Helen Mirren ("1923"), Elisabeth Moss ("The Handmaid's Tale"), and Reese Witherspoon ("The Morning Show"). According to the predictions commentary, this category reflected broader shifts in the current awards season, where competition remained "fierce from top to bottom" across most Golden Globes categories.
